Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Ramayana Stories Download For Harinam

Other · asked by user [] · 2008-04-03 · 0 answers
Hare krishna,

We are planning to carry out nityananda harinam in our yatra by visiting house to house and sharing with them the holy name and Rama katha since Rama Navamai is just around the corner.

Does anyone know if there is anywhere in the web I can download Ramayana stories with the learning points ? There is a lot of website with Ramayana stories but not directly outlining the learning points.

What I am looking for is Ramayana stories with the learning points that we can share with the people when we do the harinam. Example is Ravana is the embodiment of lust where if one head is cut, another just grows back and the only way of conquering that lust is the chanting of the holy name.
